svg.title: Detailed MapReduce workflow — Employee Payroll Join
svg.desc: Employee CSV feeds EmployeeMapper; payroll CSV feeds PayrollMapper. Both emit keyed by employeeId. Shuffle groups them. Reducer joins and computes totalPay and maxPay.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the schema of the employee CSV file?')
sendPrompt('What is the schema of the payroll CSV file?')
sendPrompt('What validation does PayrollMapper perform on salary and bonus?')
sendPrompt('What is the tag prefix used in EmployeeMapper output values?')
sendPrompt('What is the tag prefix used in PayrollMapper output values?')
sendPrompt('How does Hadoop shuffle and sort work for the reduce-side join?')
sendPrompt('Show me what the reducer receives after shuffle for EMP01')
g.text: All months bundled with employee record

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does PayrollReducer perform the reduce-side join?')
sendPrompt('What does a final output record look like from the payroll join?')
